inputs.title: Define acceptance contract for navigation i18n
inputs.description: Specify measurable locale completeness criteria and stable reconnect status handling before another implementation round.

rubric.criterion: Names explicit locale coverage criteria per supported language, not a vague 'translate everything' goal.
Forbids comparing reconnect sentinel logic to translated user-facing strings.
Each criterion maps to an automated or manual check the reviewer can apply without re-reading the full diff.

provenance.source: Acceptance-contract slice paired with long-review-loop decomposition case.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized from multi-round code-feature review patterns; no live transcript archived.
